_comment: OPTIONAL, owner opt-in: pre-approves the build/simulator/git/release commands so the autonomous run has no permission prompts under --permission-mode acceptEdits. Review it yourself, then activate with:  cp docs/claude-permissions-template.json .claude/settings.json  (must be done BEFORE launching claude — permission rules load at session start). The simpler alternative is running claude with --dangerously-skip-permissions instead.
